about_page.title: A premium partner for ambitious multilingual brands.
about_page.subtitle: Core Tech combines strategy, design, and technical delivery to build digital experiences that perform across markets.

story.title: Built to align brand clarity with delivery quality.
story.paragraph_1: We started Core Tech to close the gap between beautiful brand presentation and practical business performance.
story.paragraph_2: Our work blends polished UI, SEO-ready structure, bilingual content systems, and scalable frontend foundations.
story.paragraph_3: The result is a delivery model that helps teams launch faster, communicate more clearly, and grow with confidence.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Help brands scale with premium multilingual experiences that are strategically clear, technically reliable, and commercially effective.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: Set a higher standard for digital delivery in the region through refined execution, sustainable systems, and measurable impact.

team.title: A focused cross-functional team.
team.description: Strategy, design, content, and engineering specialists working as one delivery unit.
